items.title: RSVP and attend Engramme 'Memory Singularity' event today
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Apr 23: Invite-only event to experience Large Memory Models live at Engramme's office (785 Market St, SF) on Monday April 27, 2026.

items.title: Check with Martin from Array on Optery conflict and circle back to Lawrence
items.context: Email from derek@fin.capital on Apr 22: 'We're also checking with Martin from Array on conflict and will circle back shortly' — commitment made in follow-up to Lawrence at Optery.

items.title: Review Opti sales deck and Gong recordings shared by Barak Perelman
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Apr 23: Shared sales deck, Gong recording of CISO demo with WM, and 5-min AWS pitch + demo. Richie had requested customer-facing materials.

items.title: Connect Sentra CEO (Ashwin) with Amex AI investments team
items.context: Email thread Apr 20-21: Fan committed to intro — 'I just heard back from my friend who leads AI investments and partnerships at Amex, and she is very interested.' Ashwin replied: 'Love to get connected to the Amex Team.'

items.title: Follow up with Logan on VanishID product testing and respond to Matt Polak
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Apr 22: 'Logan -- just making sure you are all set with my team. I understand Elizabeth already had her session.' Awaiting Logan's feedback to continue diligence.

items.title: Review flowstate DD Q&A responses from Oliver Beach and discuss with team
items.context: Email from oliver@flowstate.inc on Apr 19 (forwarded Apr 20): Detailed Q&A covering team, traction, business model, financing, and competitive moat. Follow-up meeting was scheduled for Apr 20.

items.title: Schedule Logan meeting with Huskeys CEO Itai in SF
items.context: Email thread Apr 24: Jake and Itai coordinated a Zoom call after Itai couldn't make it to the city. Next step is setting up an in-person SF meeting with Logan.

items.title: Prep for judging venture-scale startups at NYU Stern
items.context: Calendar event 'NYU - Building Venture Scale Startups, Judge' on Apr 29 at 9:45am ET at NYU Stern School of Business with 3 other judges.

items.title: Prep for Alpha Edison / Tara call
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital (Derek) / AE (Tara) - Call' on Apr 28 at 3pm ET — LP/investor call with Tara Nikkhoo from Alpha Edison.
